title: 大阪杯の後に・自然発生

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hanshin Racecourse is alive with excitement.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That's... the problem child, Agnes Tachyon. Her
running style is quite something.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I couldn't turn my eyes away! Her potential
is a real force to be reckoned with!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
With what she's shown us today, one has to
acknowledge her true strength...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The standing ovation which ensues is in no doubt
meant for Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(Well, isn't the crowd boisterous today? Is that...
my name they're calling?)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(...Hmm. It would appear to be the result of my
running.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you, guinea pig! What did you think
about my run?
choice_data_list: How are you feeling? Are you hurt anywhere?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh, I feel great, as you can see!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just like I promised, I can do just fine in the
senior races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Mhm. Yet this is only a pit stop, dear guinea pig!
The journey to discover the true potential of
Umamusume has only just begin!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've finally set sail with my hull intact. The sea is
vast and the world my oyster!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
To that end, your assistance will be
indispensable, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, the next race is the Takarazuka Kinen, a race
200 meters longer in distance than this one.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That means it is imperative to raise my lactate
threshold, as well as my resistance to lactic acid.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That is why I spent an entire night developing this
new concoction! Ta-da!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From her pocket, she pulls out a liquid glowing
fluorescent pink.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My body is a temple. Which is where you come in,
dear guinea pig.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me a veteran guinea pig such as
yourself is afraid because of a mere color.
Heh-heh-heh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As always, she's coercing me to consume her
latest concoction.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, the cheering and applause continues
with no end in sight.
